_meta.description: {PROJECT_NAME} — Machine Registry. Authoritative source for all node connection info.
_meta.purpose: Agent orientation, remote access routing, fleet awareness
_meta.note: No credentials stored here. SSH auth via key. Sudo via NOPASSWD sudoers. SA-relative paths throughout. Fill in your fleet — one entry per machine.

NODE_ID.role: What this machine does in the fleet

network.tailscale_ip: Tailscale IP — this is the stable address for all agent ops
network.lan_ip: LAN IP — fallback only, may change

NODE_ID.status: primary | active | always_on | mobile_command | offline | out_of_rotation

[PRIMARY_NODE_ID]._note: ⚑ FIRST_BOOT — Replace with your primary workstation details.
[PRIMARY_NODE_ID].role: Primary workstation — development, agent ops, KVM host if applicable

network.lan_ip: [LAN_IP — verify with ip addr, may change]

[SECONDARY_NODE_ID]._note: Optional — add a secondary node if you have one (e.g., macOS VM, secondary laptop).
[SECONDARY_NODE_ID].role: Secondary agent node — road use or alternate environment

network.note: Prefer Tailscale IPs for all agent remote ops — works on-LAN and remote equally. LAN IPs may change.

setup_status.[PRIMARY_NODE_ID]: complete — key installed, NOPASSWD sudoers active
